task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard or main navigation menu is visible, indicating successful login with admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Lists management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lists' administration page is open in the main content frame.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the Ethnicity/Race list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The selected list in the dropdown menu or page header is 'Ethnicity', 'Race', or 'ethrace'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct ID/Code for the new option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the new list item's ID/Code contains the exact text 'haitian'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Title for the new option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the new list item's Title contains the exact text 'Haitian'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new option is set to be active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Active' checkbox corresponding to the new 'Haitian' entry is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the new option was successfully saved to the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list is saved and 'Haitian' appears as a confirmed, saved row in the Ethnicity/Race list, or a success/saved confirmation message is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions occur within a standard web browser navigating the OpenEMR interface, not via terminal commands, curl, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine OpenEMR graphical user interface, not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or static image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the frontend UI to add the list option.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent adds the option through the provided input fields in the OpenEMR Lists UI, rather than running SQL queries in a terminal or database management tool like phpMyAdmin.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves OpenEMR. The default administrative credentials are username 'admin' and password 'pass'. The system uses 'ethrace', 'ethnicity', or 'race' as internal list identifiers for the Ethnicity/Race list. The expected option title is 'Haitian'.
